members.name: CanInstantiate
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script can be instantiated.

members.name: GetBaseScript
members.summary: Returns the script directly inherited by this script.

members.name: GetGlobalName
members.summary: Returns the class name associated with the script, if there is one. Returns an empty string otherwise. To give the script a global name, you can use the [code]class_name[/code] keyword in GDScript and the [code][GlobalClass][/code] attribute in C#. [codeblocks] [gdscript] class_name MyNode extends Node [/gdscript] [csharp] using Godot; [GlobalClass] public partial class MyNode : Node { } [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: GetPropertyDefaultValue
members.summary: Returns the default value of the specified property.

members.name: GetRpcConfig
members.summary: Returns a [Dictionary] mapping method names to their RPC configuration defined by this script.

members.name: GetScriptConstantMap
members.summary: Returns a dictionary containing constant names and their values.

members.name: GetScriptMethodList
members.summary: Returns the list of methods in this [Script]. [b]Note:[/b] The dictionaries returned by this method are formatted identically to those returned by [method Object.get_method_list].

members.name: GetScriptPropertyList
members.summary: Returns the list of properties in this [Script]. [b]Note:[/b] The dictionaries returned by this method are formatted identically to those returned by [method Object.get_property_list].

members.name: GetScriptSignalList
members.summary: Returns the list of signals defined in this [Script]. [b]Note:[/b] The dictionaries returned by this method are formatted identically to those returned by [method Object.get_signal_list].

members.name: HasScriptMethod
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script, or a base class, defines a method with the given name.

members.name: HasScriptSignal
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script, or a base class, defines a signal with the given name.

members.name: HasSourceCode
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script contains non-empty source code. [b]Note:[/b] If a script does not have source code, this does not mean that it is invalid or unusable. For example, a [GDScript] that was exported with binary tokenization has no source code, but still behaves as expected and could be instantiated. This can be checked with [method can_instantiate].

members.name: InstanceHas
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param base_object] is an instance of this script.

members.name: IsAbstract
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script is an abstract script. An abstract script does not have a constructor and cannot be instantiated.

members.name: IsTool
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the script is a tool script. A tool script can run in the editor.

members.name: Reload
members.summary: Reloads the script's class implementation. Returns an error code.

members.name: SourceCode
members.summary: The script source code or an empty string if source code is not available. When set, does not reload the class implementation automatically.
